Thanks for contributing to Race Condition!

Before submitting:
- For larger changes, please open an issue first to discuss the approach.
- Make sure `make test` and `make lint` pass locally.
- Sign your commits (SSH or GPG).
- See CONTRIBUTING.md for full guidelines.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

<!-- Delete the lines that don't apply. -->
- 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- 📝 Documentation
- ⚡️ Performance
- 🔧 Chore / build / CI
- 💥 Breaking change (would cause existing functionality to break)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include commands or steps a reviewer can
     repeat. Mention any manual verification. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] License headers present on new source files
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant
- [ ] Commits are signed and follow Conventional Commits format
